title: 「Every + 單數名詞」句型
titleZh: 「Every + 單數名詞」表達每一位或每一項
titleEn: Using every + singular noun for all members of a group

source.file: Sentence Structure 42 - 「Every 句：every + 單數名詞」.pdf

formula: Every + singular countable noun + singular verb + other information

formulas.formula: Every + singular countable noun + singular verb + other information

formulas.labelZh: Every 片語作受詞或其他成分
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + every + singular countable noun + other information
Not every + singular countable noun + singular verb + other information

example: Personal habits may not fit every society.
exampleZh: 個人的習慣未必適合每一個社會。

examples.en: Personal habits may not fit every society.
examples.zh: 個人的習慣未必適合每一個社會。

meaning.zh: Every 表示一個群體中的每一個成員，名詞和作主語時的動詞均使用單數形式。

rules.en: Use a singular countable noun after every.
rules.zh: Every 後面使用單數可數名詞。

rules.en: Use a singular verb when an every-phrase is the subject.
rules.zh: Every 片語作主語時，使用單數動詞。

rules.en: Every can appear in different sentence positions.
rules.zh: Every 可以作主語、受詞，亦可用於時間和地點表達。
Not every 表示「並非全部」，而不是全部都不。

rules.en: Do not use every directly with an uncountable noun.
rules.zh: Every 不可直接配合不可數名詞。

rules.en: Every day and everyday have different meanings.
rules.zh: Every day 表示每天；everyday 是形容詞，表示日常的。

benefits.en: It clearly includes all members of a group.
benefits.zh: 它能清楚表示一組之中的所有成員。

benefits.en: It is useful for rules and general statements.
benefits.zh: 它適合表達適用於所有人的規則和普遍情況。

benefits.en: It highlights that nobody or nothing is omitted.
benefits.zh: 它能突顯每一位或每一項都包括在內。

benefits.en: It works naturally with time and place expressions.
benefits.zh: 它可自然用於每一天、每一頁、每一層等時間和地點表達。

benefits.en: Not every allows accurate partial negatives.
benefits.zh: Not every 能準確表達「並非全部」。

en: Rewrite each sentence using every + singular countable noun or not every where appropriate.
Preserve the original meaning and use a singular verb when the every-phrase is the subject.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 every＋單數可數名詞或在適當情況使用 not every 改寫以下句子。
答案須保留原句意思；every 片語作主語時須使用單數動詞。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: All students need a pencil for this activity.
questions.promptZh: 所有學生進行這項活動時都需要一枝鉛筆。
questions.answer: Every student needs a pencil for this activity.
questions.answerZh: 每名學生進行這項活動時都需要一枝鉛筆。
questions.highlight: Every student needs a pencil for this activity.

questions.prompt: All rooms in the flat have a window.
questions.promptZh: 單位內所有房間都有一扇窗。
questions.answer: Every room in the flat has a window.

questions.highlight: Every room in the flat has a window.
